headline: Is CBRE Group Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: CBRE Group has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain strongly optimistic about its prospects.

raw.headline: Is CBRE Group Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
raw.summary: CBRE Group has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain strongly optimistic about its prospects.

headline: CBRE (CBRE) Loses 11.4% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for CBRE (CBRE) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

raw.headline: CBRE (CBRE) Loses 11.4% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
raw.summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for CBRE (CBRE) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

headline: Brookfield acquires two New Zealand hotels for $148m
summary: The acquisition of Rydges Wellington and Sofitel Queenstown increases Brookfield’s holdings in New Zealand to NZ$1bn.
